title: From cabaret to classical: The many lives of Asha Bhosale, India’s timeless voice
content: Legendary Indian singer Asha Bhosle, a global icon with a 70-year career, has passed away at 92. Known for her versatile voice and numerous hit songs, she was recognized by Guinness World Records as the most recorded artist. Bhosle also ventured into composing and acting, leaving an indelible mark on music and cinema.

title: 'Baseless narratives': India says China renaming places in Arunachal 'cannot alter reality'
content: India has strongly refuted China's latest attempt to rename places in Arunachal Pradesh. New Delhi described the move as a mischievous effort to assert false claims. Such actions by China cannot alter the reality that Arunachal Pradesh is an integral part of India. These attempts undermine efforts to stabilize bilateral ties between the two nations.

title: Vance says Trump called ‘a dozen times’ during peace talks with Iran
content: US Vice President JD Vance revealed President Trump was in constant contact during Pakistan peace talks with Iran. Negotiations stalled over Iran's nuclear program, with the US demanding an end to enrichment. Iran deemed US demands unreasonable, citing past distrust, while Pakistan pledged to facilitate future dialogue.

title: Microsoft VP says even if companies lays off 50% workforce due to AI, business will increase
content: Microsoft's Rajesh Jha counters fears of an AI-driven software slump, arguing that AI agents will require their own licenses.  He posits that as companies deploy thousands of these digital assistants, the number of 'paying users' could actually surge, even as human workforces shrink. This perspective challenges the notion that AI will diminish software revenue by reducing human users.

title: Kerala woman ‘sexually harassed’ on way to hospital after accident
content: A woman injured in an accident in Kayamkulam has filed a complaint alleging sexual harassment by a man who helped shift her to the hospital. The accused was questioned and released, prompting the victim to claim lapses in the investigation. State police chief has sought a detailed report and an internal probe is underway.

title: Meta's most-popular former employee and father of AI calls Anthropic's latest model as 'drama'
content: Yann LeCun, Meta's former chief AI scientist and deep learning pioneer, has dismissed the panic around Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview as "BS from self-delusion." While the model's reported ability to find vulnerabilities in every major operating system and browser spooked Wall Street and triggered an emergency Fed meeting, LeCun and other AI researchers argue the threat is overhyped—though cybersecurity firms using Mythos disagree.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 25: Ranveer's film is set to cross Rs 1080 crore in India
content: In a groundbreaking move for Bollywood, Ranveer Singh's action-packed thriller 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has taken the box office by storm, eclipsing the Rs 1000 crore net milestone in India. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the film is maintaining its momentum in the fourth week of release, attracting enthusiastic audiences and raking in impressive collections both daily and weekly. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Bihar: Power play brews between JD(U) and BJP for CM post as Nitish packs bags at 1 Anne Marg
content: Bihar's political landscape is heating up as Chief Minister Nitish Kumar is set to resign for a Rajya Sabha seat, with the BJP expected to nominate the new CM. JD(U) workers are advocating for Nitish's son, Nishant, to take over, while the RJD alleges a conspiracy driven by BJP pressure.

title: After Amazon stock's worst day since 2022, CEO Andy Jassy has a message for Wall Street
content: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy used his annual shareholder letter to defend the company's $200 billion AI spending plan for 2026—months after the announcement tanked the stock over 10% in a single session. Jassy disclosed AWS's AI business has hit a $15 billion annual run rate, pointed to customer commitments backing "a substantial portion" of the capex, and compared the current AI cycle to Amazon's early bet on cloud computing.

title: Dianna Russini, Mike Vrabel scandal takes darker turn; past tweet raises serious dating questions
content: Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel are under scrutiny after Arizona hotel photos sparked rumors of a relationship. Both denied any romantic involvement, calling the meeting professional. However, a resurfaced January 2026 post by Russini supporting Vrabel has fueled fresh speculation. Reports also suggest the photos were quietly circulated before publication, adding mystery, though no verified evidence confirms any personal relationship between them.

title: 'A deeply sad day for India': Sachin, Kohli mourn Asha Bhosle’s demise
content: India mourned the passing of legendary singer Asha Bhosle at 92 on Sunday. Tributes poured in from icons like Sachin Tendulkar and Virat Kohli, who remembered her legacy and warmth. She died in Mumbai due to multi-organ failure, with last respects scheduled at her residence before final rites at Shivaji Park.

title: Arjun Tendulkar's sister Sara, wife Saania in stands for LSG vs GT clash
content: Arjun Tendulkar's wife Saania Chandhok and sister Sara Tendulkar were seen cheering for Lucknow Super Giants at the Ekana Stadium. Arjun, part of the LSG squad, did not play in the match against Gujarat Titans. GT captain Shubman Gill won the toss and chose to bowl first, while LSG captain Rishabh Pant confirmed an unchanged playing XI.

title: Iran’s chief negotiator blames US for 'failing to gain trust' after peace talks in Pakistan collapse
content: Iran's chief negotiator blamed the US for the failure to reach a deal at Islamabad talks, citing a lack of trust despite Iran presenting "forward-looking initiatives." US Vice President JD Vance stated no agreement was reached, emphasizing the need for Iran's affirmative commitment against pursuing nuclear weapons.

title: Ayush Shetty's dream run ends; loses to Shi Yu Qi in Badminton Asia Championships final
content: Young Indian shuttler Ayush Shetty reached the Badminton Asia Championships final, becoming the first Indian in 61 years to do so. Despite a loss to China's Shi Yu Qi in the final, Shetty's impressive run included victories over three top-10 players, notably stunning Paris 2024 silver medallist Kunlavut Vitidsarn in the semifinals.

title: China eyes strategic gains across Asia as US remains tied down in Gulf crisis
content: The Middle East conflict creates strategic space for China's influence expansion in Asia as US attention diverts. Historical patterns show China increasing activity in the South China Sea and near Taiwan during US focus on other global crises. These calibrated actions, below escalation thresholds, alter the regional strategic environment.

title: 'One of the most iconic and versatile voices’: PM Modi condoles death of Asha Bhosle
content: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle has passed away at the age of 92 in Mumbai after reportedly suffering a cardiac arrest and respiratory issues. Her son confirmed her demise, prompting an outpouring of tributes from celebrities and fans. Prime Minister Narendra Modi expressed deep sadness, remembering her extraordinary musical journey and timeless brilliance.

title: Aayush Sharma recalls Asha Bhosle as the ‘global ambassador of culture' - Exclusive
content: Legendary playback singer Asha Bhosle has passed away in Mumbai. Her son confirmed the news. Bhosle was a global ambassador of Indian culture. Actor Aayush Sharma paid tribute, calling her a timeless architect of melodies. Her songs shaped childhoods and will live on forever. The last rites will be performed tomorrow at Shivaji Park.

title: ‘Misleading the country’: Jairam Ramesh slams Modi govt over caste census delay
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh accused the Modi government of delaying a caste census, citing contradictory statements and policy shifts. He highlighted the government's past refusals, Prime Minister Modi's criticism of caste census demands, and a recent announcement of its inclusion.

title: Russian crude with Indian touch: What is Bangladesh's new crude sourcing strategy?
content: Bangladesh is exploring a proposal to refine Russian crude oil in India before importing the finished fuel, aiming to ease supply pressures from the West Asia conflict. The Energy and Mineral Resources Division has requested approval to discuss a government-to-government agreement with India, as its local refinery cannot process Russian crude.

title: TCS makes 25,000 fresher offers for FY27, hiring to depend on demand: CEO
content: TCS has extended 25,000 job offers to fresh graduates for FY27, with future hiring contingent on market demand.  The IT giant, which hired 44,000 freshers last year, is maintaining its delivery model and focusing on project needs.  CEO Krithivasan described the demand pipeline as stable, with early signs of recovery in client spending across various sectors.

title: 'I wasn’t really ...': Ayush Mhatre breaks silence on being retired out in CSK innings
content: Mhatre, who scored 59 off 36 balls, was finding it difficult to accelerate against spells from Lungi Ngidi and T Natarajan. With runs needed in the final overs, the team brought in Shivam Dube.

title: She sang like magic, dressed like poetry: Remembering Asha Bhosle’s timeless saree elegance
content: Asha Bhosle's enduring style, marked by her love for sarees, offered a lesson in effortless grace. She consistently chose simple, elegant drapes, often in white, reflecting a grounded personality that complemented her vibrant voice. Her sartorial choices were deeply personal, rooted in cultural pride and a touching connection with her son, proving simplicity can be profoundly impactful.

title: 'Keep it up': Usman Tariq responds after Ashwin backs PSL batter walking away
content: Tariq, whose action features a stop-and-pause, side-arm release, has drawn attention in recent times. The discussion around his action grew during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026, where opinions were divided on its legality and impact.

title: 'We need young jansevak': JD(U) workers pitch Nishant Kumar as ‘future CM’ in Bihar after Nitish’s exit
content: Posters in Patna advocating for Nishant Kumar as Bihar's future Chief Minister have ignited political discussions following Nitish Kumar's move to the Rajya Sabha. While speculation mounts about Nishant's potential role, JD(U) leaders assert Nitish Kumar remains the guiding force. This transition signals a significant shift in Bihar's political dynamics.

title: Sanju Samson thanks 'lucky person' after century, and it's not his wife
content: Asked to bat first, the CSK batter registered his first notable innings in a Yellow jersey and shared a 113-run stand with Ayush Mhatre for the second wicket in a little over 11 overs.

title: ‘They’ll kill me’: UP woman’s screams as in-laws attack over dowry demand
content: A video of a woman being brutally assaulted by her railway-retired father-in-law in Kanpur has gone viral. The victim alleges dowry harassment and severe physical abuse, including clothes being torn and attacks on private parts. Police have registered an FIR and made one arrest after the incident.

title: Dhruvastra: India’s helicopter-launched ‘tank killer’ shaping next-gen battlefield doctrine
content: India's self-reliance in advanced weaponry is bolstered by the induction-ready Dhruvastra, a helicopter-launched anti-tank missile. Developed by DRDO, this third-generation system offers fire-and-forget capability and precision targeting, significantly enhancing India's anti-armour warfare capabilities, especially in high-altitude terrains.

title: TS Inter 1st, 2nd year result 2026: Girls outperform boys in both years
content: Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education has announced the IPE March 2026 results, with girls outperforming boys in both first and second year exams. The pass percentage gap between girls and boys remained significant across general and vocational streams. Students can check their results online and apply for recounting or re-verification from April 13 to April 20, 2026.

title: IPL: Sanju Samson knocks down MS Dhoni's record; joins KL Rahul to...
content: Samson’s unbeaten 115 off 56 balls was the key to one of Chennai’s better batting performances this season.

title: Tamil Nadu assembly polls: Udhayanidhi Stalin launches campaign in Mannargudi
content: Tamil Nadu leaders are actively campaigning for the upcoming Assembly elections. Udhayanidhi Stalin launched his campaign in Mannargudi, criticizing rivals and emphasizing regional identity. Chief Minister M K Stalin campaigned in Paramakudi, alleging the BJP is using the AIADMK as a mask. Welfare promises for women, housing, and education were reiterated. The elections are scheduled for April 23.

title: US-Iran talks pause without breakthrough: 5 reasons why negotiations failed in Pakistan
content: US-Iran nuclear talks in Islamabad concluded without a deal after 21 hours, with deep divisions over nuclear commitments, sanctions relief, and regional control preventing a breakthrough. Both sides indicated future discussions, but significant disagreements over enrichment, frozen assets, and maritime security remain.

title: Engineering student arrested for ramming SUV into scooter in Gurgaon; 2 dead
content: A 21-year-old engineering student, Akrit Yadav, has been arrested for allegedly causing a fatal accident in Gurgaon's Sector 57. Driving an SUV on the wrong side, he crashed into a scooter, killing two young men. Eyewitnesses reported suspicious behavior, including the driver discarding a bottle. Investigations are ongoing.

title: How Rory McIlroy's Saturday stumble sets up a dramatic Sunday at the Masters
content: After losing the biggest 36-hole lead in Masters history, McIlroy and Augusta will have another spin Sunday.

title: Moving day: Young ties Rory amid Masters drama
content: Cameron Young, who started the day eight back of Rory McIlroy, shot a 7-under 65 and is tied with the defending champion entering the final round of the Masters.

title: Urged by Trump, UFC adds Lewis-Hokit to WH card
content: The UFC added a heavyweight matchup between Derrick Lewis and Josh Hokit to its White House event, and according to Dana White, the move happened after President Donald Trump asked why Lewis wasn't on the card.

title: Fury dominates Makhmudov, calls out Joshua
content: Tyson Fury shook off some ring rust on his comeback to earn a unanimous points win over Arslanbek Makhmudov on Saturday and potentially set up a long-awaited clash with Anthony Joshua.

title: Badly hobbled, Ulberg KO's Procházka to win title
content: Moments after suffering an apparent injury to his knee, Carlos Ulberg rocked Jiří Procházka with a left hook en route to a knockout victory to become the new light heavyweight champion at UFC 327.

title: Hayes hails U.S. evolution after 10th straight win
content: Rose Lavelle had a goal and an assist and the United States won the first of three matches against Japan 2-1 on Saturday.

title: Denver wins third NCAA hockey title in five years
content: Denver registered a 2-1 victory over Wisconsin to win the Frozen Four and claim the program's third national championship in five years.

title: 'That's not him': Lindor's gaffes leave Mets at loss
content: Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor had his third miscue in two days during an 11-6 loss to the A's, and manager Carlos Mendoza acknowledged the uncharacteristic lapses were "hard to explain."

title: 🏀 NBA postseason intel: Big questions, more
content: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

title: NBA playoff watch: What's at stake on Sunday
content: We break down every seeding possibility, plus a look at the race to secure the best odds for the No. 1 pick.

title: The NFL draft's biggest risers: Seven players who have boosted their stock
content: Dillon Thieneman and Monroe Freeling have drastically boosted their stock since the start of last season. Who else has climbed the board?

title: How Keyshawn Johnson made draft history 30 years ago with the Jets
content: The 1996 draft didn't produce a first-round QB, but the Jets found a playmaker with star power in Johnson.

title: UFC 327 takeaways: Ulberg blew out his knee, but Procházka blew his title chance
content: Jiří Procházka showed Carlos Ulberg too much mercy, and Josh Hokit reached beyond gimmicks at UFC 327.

title: UFC 327 results: Carlos Ulberg stuns Jiří Procházka to win light heavyweight title
content: City Kickboxing has a new champion following Carlos Ulberg's title win over Jiří Procházka at UFC 327.

title: Breaking down Cal Raleigh's first 55 plate appearances of 2026 -- and what's gone wrong for the Mariners
content: Seattle's biggest stars have struggled at the plate as the team has gotten off to rough start this season. How real are the concerns? Let's find out.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Brewers, Pirates rise as Red Sox fall in Week 2
content: Teams with championship hopes fall down our list while unexpected contenders have made surprise starts.

title: UCLA and its six seniors are eyeing a WNBA draft takeover
content: Can UCLA make history and have all six seniors -- who scored all of the team's points at the Final Four -- drafted in the WNBA?

title: WNBA draft preview: The case for every potential No. 1 pick
content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

title: King's gambit: Why NBA players are turning to chess
content: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back, what's next for the glamour division?
content: Tyson Fury won and called out Anthony Joshua, and with Deontay Wilder back, the heavyweight division is buzzing.

title: Arsenal ratings: Havertz, Martinelli 4/10 in loss to Bournemouth that hits title hopes
content: Arsenal's Premier League title ambitions suffered a huge blow at the hands of Bournemouth, as the Gunners succumbed to a shock 2-1 defeat at home.

title: From Cyndi Lauper to 'The Man': The evolution of women's wrestling at WrestleMania
content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Carrick pushing for Man United to sign Rogers
content: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick has recommended Morgan Rogers as a target this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: A quiet shift is in progress in Hubballi
content: For generations, stone carving defined the identity and livelihood of the Waddar community living beside the road leading to Hosur Circle

title: Statewide taxi service plays a crucial role in organ donation
content: The service significantly enhanced the coordination and management of the various activities involved in the donation

title: Andhra Pradesh DGP directs police to crack down on gambling, betting during IPL season
content: DGP Harish Kumar Gupta directs Commissioners and SPs to prevent gambling and betting; surveillance stepped up on social media during IPL

title: Kannur dental college student death raises questions about casteism in campuses
content: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

title: ED probes alleged criminal syndicate in West Bengal, summons two for questioning
content: Summonses have been issued to Howrah Joint Commissioner Gaurav Lal and ‘land mafia’ Joy Kamdar, an agency official says, adding that the role of several TMC leaders is also coming to light, and they are under the scanner of the investigation

title: Consolidated voters’ list of 12 States and UTs that underwent SIR Phase II trimmed by 10.2%
content: Uttar Pradesh records highest net deletion of voters in absolute numbers at 2.04 crore while Lakshadweep sees lowest at 181.

title: T.N. government launches portal for victims of usury to lodge complaints online
content: The portal, established under the recently introduced Tamil Nadu Money Lending Entities (Prevention of Coercive Actions) Act, 2025, seeks to regulate money lending activities in the State, especially by preventing coercive, unfair, and illegal recovery practices

title: Modi govt. wants to put caste census in cold storage: Congress
content: The Congress has accused the Modi government of playing politics in the name of the women's reservation law and asserted that the proposed delimitation exercise linked to it was "not constitutional"

title: BJP issues whip for MPs ahead of special parliament session
content: In a message to all of its MPs, the BJP said, "A Three-Line Whip being issued to all BJP Members in the Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha from Thursday to Saturday, 16th to 18th April 2026."

title: India rejects China’s ‘mischievous attempts’ to assign ‘fictitious’ names to places in Arunachal
content: The External Affairs Ministry said China should refrain from actions which inject negativity into relations and undermine efforts to create better understanding

title: Asha Bhosle death: Political leaders offer tributes
content: Political figures express their sorrow and admiration for legendary singer Asha Bhosle’s remarkable contributions to Indian music

title: Three boys drown while swimming in Andhra’s ASR district; second such tragedy in a week
content: Three boys aged between 10 and 11 drown in Matsyagedda at Pedabayalu mandal; second such incident in Alluri Sitharama Raju (ASR) district after three girls drowned on April 9

title: Asha Bhosle’s Tamil songs: Not many, but all outstanding
content: After hours of careful practice, Asha Bhosle delivered the Shenbagame Shenbagame song (from the movie Enga Ooru Pattukaran) to perfection — and it went on to resonate across every corner of Tamil Nadu, recounts Gangai Amaran

title: Death of BDS student: KUHS constitutes enquiry committee
content: The committee, led by Dr. Ajith Neelakantan, Governing Council Member, has been entrusted with examining the background and circumstances leading to the incident

title: TMC supports 'tukde-tukde' gang that threatened to snap Siliguri Corridor because of appeasement: PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the TMC has destroyed the State during its 15-year tenure, and halted implementation of central schemes, as a result of which less than 25% of work has been completed.

title: BJP wants to carry out delimitation exercise to trifurcate Bengal: Mamata
content: The SIR is the biggest scam the country has seen in recent times. Everyone in the world knows that your government will topple in 2026, says West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee

title: SHRC orders probe into dental student’s death
content: The Commission has also issued a directive asking the Kannur City Police Chief to submit a detailed report amid claims that the student had faced caste-based harassment

title: Special session on sacrilege law an attempt by AAP Government to cover up its failures: Punjab Cong chief
content: The state Congress chief asked why the AAP had "failed" to punish those responsible for the sacrilege and the later killing of protesters. He was referring to the series of sacrilege incidents in 2015, the protests that followed, and the killing of two Sikhs in police firing at the protesters

title: ‘Operation Night Safety’ drive: Anantapur police book 34 drunken driving cases, 91 for open drinking
content: Anantapur SP P. Jagadeesh supervised ‘Operation Night Safety’ drive; 34 drunken driving cases and 91 cases of open drinking booked on April 11 night

title: BJP appoints Shivraj Chouhan as central observer for election of Bihar legislative party leader
content: Earlier in the day, JD(U) national working president Sanjay Kumar Jha said the process of the formation of the new government in Bihar will roll out after April 13

title: Andhra University at 100: Vice-Chancellor outlines roadmap
content: The Andhra University is taking steps to establish a dedicated quantum computing laboratory with an outlay of ₹10 crore under the Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan

title: CPI(M) workers held for arson attack on supporter’s house in Payyannur
content: They had attacked the house of T. Purushothaman, who had supported independent candidate V. Kunhikrishnan

title: Andhra Pradesh sets up 107 waste processing centres at ₹528 crore, targets June deadline
content: A.P. Swachha Andhra Corporation says 107 fresh waste processing centres across Urban Local Bodies will be operational by mid-June with 5,385 tons daily capacity

title: Janardhan Reddy performs bhumi puja for ₹5.08 crore pilgrim facilities at Yaganti temple
content: Roads and Buildings Minister B.C. Janardhan Reddy performs bhumi puja for ₹5.08 crore pilgrim facilities at Yaganti temple in Banaganapalle, Andhra Pradesh

title: Student kidnapped for ransom by friends; rescued within five hours
content: Police said the incident occurred on the night of April 11, when information was received on the Namma 112 emergency helpline about a student being forcibly taken away in a car

title: Peenya flyover load testing postponed, vehicle movement to continue as usual
content: To facilitate testing, authorities had proposed restricting all types of vehicular movement on the stretch from 5 a.m. on April 13 to 11 a.m. on April 17

title: 163 children being trafficked to Maharashtra rescued in M.P.’s Katni; 8 arrested
content: Eight men escorting the boys booked under Section 143 (trafficking of persons) of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS).

title: ‘Jana Nayagan’ leak tests new legal penalties, torrent downloads under scanner
content: As the film’s producers rush to contain the fallout of the Vijay-starrer’s leak, their anti-piracy partner is attempting to stem distribution, while preserving torrent traffic logs

title: Star Health data leak case: Madras High Court dismisses appeals by cybersecurity services provider
content: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan refuse to entertain six writ appeals

title: Kannur dental college student death: Audio clip surfaces; family alleges harassment
content: The Kannur dental college student’s parents alleged that he faced caste-based discrimination, colour-based insults and repeated ragging from senior students, and that complaints to authorities were ignored

title: Farmer dies in elephant attack in Karnataka’s Belur
content: Human-elephant conflicts have been a recurring problem for many years in parts of the Belur, Sakleshpur, and Alur taluks of Hassan District

title: Elephant strays into Doddabetta Peak; tourist attraction closed
content: Officials said the animal is a sub-adult, which may have recently split from its herd and is trying to find a niche for itself to occupy in the fragmented Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve (NBR) landscape.

title: Asha Bhosle, legendary playback singer, passes away at 92 in Mumbai
content: Asha Bhosle was admitted to a private hospital in Mumbai’s Breach Candy on April 11 evening following a chest infection and exhaustion

title: We have created a safe environment that encourages women to speak up: DMK Minister Geetha Jeevan
content: Tamil Nadu Social Welfare Minister P. Geetha Jeevan says number of cases registered, chargesheets filed, and convictions secured have increased; highlighting steps taken to ensure fresh eggs for noon day meals, she promises efforts to ease traffic woes, boost healthcare and create more jobs in Thoothukudi

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: VCK returns to its roots in the south
content: The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi’s journey as a political party began when Thol. Thirumavalavan took over the mantle of the Dalit Panthers Iyakkam (DPI) in Madurai following the passing of its leader, A. Malaichamy, in 1989.

title: Minister urges entrepreneurs to set up industries in Raichur
content: Boseraju was speaking after inaugurating Tejas workshop at the Jagajyoti Basaveshwara Auditorium on UAS campus in Raichur

title: ‘Devious intentions’: Derek O'Brien attacks govt ahead of Parliament sitting on women's quota, delimitation
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday, April 12, wrote to floor leaders of Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha, urging them to support the amendments to the women's reservation law during the special three-day session of Parliament.

title: Tamil Nadu elections: When an Achuthamenon campaigns for CPI(M) candidate in Kilvelur
content: A polio survivor, Mr. Achuthamenon, named after the former Chief Minister of Kerala, has been travelling to every nook and corner of the constituency in a campaign vehicle equipped with a public address system, canvassing votes for the party’s candidate, D. Latha

title: Amarnath Yatra to begin from July 3; registrations to open from April 15
content: Pilgrims between the ages of 13 and 70 can undertake the yatra and registrations will begin from April 15, the L-G told reporters at the Lok Bhavan in Jammu

title: Injured hawksbill turtle nursed back to health, transported 600 km by road, and released in Gulf of Mannar
content: On January 8, the juvenile hawksbill turtle was found stranded along the Neelankarai coast. The animal repeatedly washed back ashore despite multiple attempts to return it to the sea

title: Telangana Inter 2026 results announced; 70.58% candidates clear exam
content: The results of the first-year candidates, combining all streams, stood at 66.20%. In all, over 9.97 lakh candidates registered for the examination

title: First-ever life-size Vivekananda statue in U.S. unveiled in Seattle
content: The unveiling of the statue was held on the occasion of the celebration of ICCR Day and is part of India’s broader cultural diplomacy initiatives

title: NTK’s transgender candidate vows to make Villivakkam a model constituency
content: She says the prevention of drug abuse among youngsters and ensuring women’s welfare will be her first priority if elected; there are plans to create playgrounds and fine arts centres to revive vanishing art forms; both the Dravidian majors have neglected issues for several decades, she adds

title: Election fever rises as political merchandise sales peak
content: The merchandise is priced upwards of ₹20, depending on size and material; most shops maintain social media accounts to advertise their latest additions

title: All the light we cannot see: Tamil Nadu’s match industry faces threat from cheap Chinese lighters
content: The match industry in Tamil Nadu, over a 100 years old, might have just met its most formidable enemy. A new threat has emerged in the form of cheap, imported, limited-use plastic lighters, and it looks like they may take the puff out of the safety match industry. S. Sundar reports on this phenomenon from Sivakasi, the match heartland of the South.

title: Hippo ‘Hamsini’ that attacked a veterinarian is in critical condition in Shivamogga Zoo
content: Wildlife veterinarians treating the animal suspect the origin of the infection could be the intrauterine foetal death

title: From myths to language: examining the renaming of Kerala
content: The Union Government’s recent approval of the proposal to rename Kerala as Keralam prompts a re-examination of the term’s historicity, including its founding legend, the context of the United Kerala Movement, and arguments for the linguistic purity of ‘Keralam’

title: What is the SIR controversy in West Bengal | Explained
content: How many names have been deleted from the electoral rolls, and why? What are the logical discrepancies identified by the ECI? Why were large numbers of voters placed under adjudication, and how was this resolved? How has the SIR process reshaped the State’s political contest?

title: Nellore police arrest man who duped youth on pretext of providing jobs in TTD
content: Based on the complaint given by the duped victims, a case was registered at the Vedayapalem Police Station under the relevant sections of cheating and forgery; during investigation, ₹25.20 lakh was seized from the accused so far.

title: RSS-BJP's main objective is to finish off Constitution: Rahul Gandhi
content: "Ambedkar ji's main message was that of the Constitution. Without the Constitution, what we call India would not have been there,” said Mr. Gandhi.

title: PM Modi urges all political parties to clear amendments to Women’s Reservation Bill in ‘one voice’
content: In response to the Prime Minister’s letter, Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge questioned the timing of bringing in the amendments and pointed to the lack of consultations on legislation that would deeply affect the federal structure

title: "Can't Alter Undeniable Reality": India On China Giving Fake Names To Areas
content: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal in a statement said India "categorically rejects any mischievous attempts by the Chinese side to assign fictitious names to places which form part of the territory of India"

content: People talk about Asha Bhosle and RD Burman's partnership being one of the most enduring in Hindi cinema  and Burman, being an epicure whose favourite was the Goan prawn curry, made demands not only on his wife's exceptional singing talent, but also

title: Opinion: Blog | Asha Bhosle Is Gone, But Her 'Bad Girl' Anthems Live On
content: It is extraordinary how Bhosle's voice has been part of the cultural landscape of changing India, signifying freedom, independence, and risk-taking. Forever brilliant, forever bubbly, forever young, she will be missed.

title: Israel Wiped Out Entire Lebanese Villages By Rigging Homes With Explosives
content: Over the course of the last two weeks, while the United States and Israel exchanged missiles, barbs and attempts to reach a peace deal, the Israeli military carried out the systematic demolition of entire villages in southern Lebanon.

title: Probe Agency ED In Overdrive In Bengal, Launches Action In Flurry Of Cases

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Liverpool player ratings: 17-year-old Ngumoha's 9/10 performance creates dilemma for Slot
content: Liverpool beat Fulham 2-0 at anfield on saturday . the hosts will stay fifth in the premier league by the end of this weekend . manager arne slot believes he still has the support from fans .

title: Senator contacts leagues over 'gambling's ugly takeover'
content: senator sends letters to six league commissioners raising concerns about "gambling's ugly takeover of sports" he asks the leagues to provide information by may 1 about their partnerships with both sportsbooks and prediction markets . he says the growing prediction market space has "only made the problem wow"

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: How Rick Tocchet steered the Flyers back into the playoff race
content: tocchet was hired as flyers coach last summer after playing 621 games with Philly . fans were critical of how he chose to deploy young star Matvei Michkov . he shook off digs that his rigid system wasn't aesthetically pleasing . there's an online petition calling for him to develop young talent .

title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
content: the federal government has opened a probe into whether the NFL is harming consumers in the way it sells its broadcast rights . a growing chorus of lawmakers and fans have expressed concern over the NFL and other leagues putting more games on subscription streaming services, leading to potentially increased costs for viewers . the probe is unclear, but the NFL has a limited antitrust exemption as part of the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 .
